title: MTN, MACD Histogram just turned positive
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a Bullish indicator signaling MTN's price could rise from here. Traders may explore going long the stock or buying call options. Tickeron A.I. dvisor identified 52 similar cases where MTN's MACD histogram became positive, and 38 of them led to successful outcomes. Odds of Success: 73%. Current price $245.58 is above $242.29 the highest support line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 09/23/20 - 10/23/20, the price experienced a +9% Uptrend. During the week of 10/16/20 - 10/23/20, the stock enjoyed a +7% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/vpek4yd7hhv51.png?width=1532&format=png&auto=webp&s=f162a2fb6ce90ff06f711ee2b45c3f3161c616b4

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on October 22, 2020. You may want to consider a long position or call options on MTN as a result. Tickeron A.I. deteted that in 70 of 94 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 74%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for MTN just turned positive on October 23, 2020. Looking at past instances where MTN's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise, Tickeron A.I. sows that in 38 of 52 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 73%.

The 50-day Moving Average for MTN moved above the 200-day moving average on September 09, 2020. This could be a long-term bullish signal for the stock as the stock shifts to an upward trend.

Following a +7.49% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where MTN advanced for three days, in 215 of 335 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 64%.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today.  Tickeron A.I. deteted that in 180 of 315 cases where MTN Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 57%.
